# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /Users/woosubkim/Documents/workspace/foldseek/build
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/local/Cellar/cmake/3.25.0/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Dependencies for the target
3di_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;mmseqs-framework;

//Build with include-what-you-use
BUILD_IWYU:BOOL=OFF

//Build python support
BUILD_PYTHON:BOOL=OFF

//Build with warnings as errors
BUILD_WERROR:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a file.
BZIP2_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX10.15.sdk/usr/include

//Path to a library.
BZIP2_LIBRARY_DEBUG:FILEPATH=BZIP2_LIBRARY_DEBUG-NOTFOUND

//Path to a library.

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=CMAKE_ADDR2LINE-NOTFOUND

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ar

//Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo
// MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=

//Enable/Disable color output during build.
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE:BOOL=ON

//CXX compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER:STRING=/usr/local/bin/g++-12

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/local/bin/gcc-ar-12

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/local/bin/gcc-ranlib-12

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//C compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER:STRING=/usr/local/bin/gcc-12

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_STRIP:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/strip

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console
// during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual
// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

//Disabling IPS4O sorting library requiring 128-bit compare exchange
// operations
DISABLE_IPS4O:BOOL=0

//Enable Warnings as Errors
ENABLE_WERROR:BOOL=0

//Enable Google Cloud Storage support
GCS_SUPPORT:BOOL=OFF

//Have ARMv8 CPU
HAVE_ARM8:BOOL=0

//Have CPU with AVX2
HAVE_AVX2:BOOL=0

//Have CPU with F16C
HAVE_F16C:BOOL=0

//Have Google Cloud Storage SDK
HAVE_GCS:BOOL=0

//Have GPROF Profiler
HAVE_GPROF:BOOL=0

//Have MPI
HAVE_MPI:BOOL=0

//Have POWER8 CPU
HAVE_POWER8:BOOL=0

//Have POWER9 CPU
HAVE_POWER9:BOOL=0

//Have s390x architecture
HAVE_S390X:BOOL=0

//Have sanitizers
HAVE_SANITIZER:BOOL=0

//Have ShellCheck
HAVE_SHELLCHECK:BOOL=1

//Have CPU with SSE2

//Have CPU with SSE4.1
HAVE_SSE4_1:BOOL=0

HAVE_TESTS:BOOL=0

NATIVE_ARCH:BOOL=1

//C compiler flags for OpenMP parallelization

OpenMP_C_LIB_NAMES:STRING=gomp

REQUIRE_OPENMP:BOOL=1

//Define the log function as natural logarithm.
TE_NAT_LOG:BOOL=OFF

//Evaluate exponents from right to left.

USE_SYSTEM_ZSTD:BOOL=0
